{{Quote|<s></s>''Grath''! Bring up the ''turbocannon''!|Baddon Fass|<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />}}
'''Grath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[darktrooper]] assigned to [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Zasm Katth]] and [[Baddon Fass]] during their [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Operation Shadow Hand)|search]] for the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|starship]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. When the two Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] the presence of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vima-Da-Boda]] in the crowds of Nar Shaddaa, Fass ordered Grath to unleash fire upon the civilians with his [[turbocannon]]. The [[Trooper/Legends|darktrooper]] complied with the order, [[Death/Legends|killing]] a large number of innocent bystanders but failing to execute the elusive Jedi.

==Biography==
===The elite of the Empire===
{{Quote|<s></s>''Let's go, men!'' I ''want'' the ''Millennium Falcon!''<s></s>|Baddon Fass, commanding Grath and other troopers to embark toward Shug Ninx's workshop|<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />}}
[[File:VimaDaBoda.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Vima-Da-Boda, whom the Imperial forces sought to kill on Nar Shaddaa]]
Grath was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" /> [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]<ref name="CSWE" /> who served the [[Transfer essence|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Dark Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. At some point, Grath was inducted into the ranks of [[darktrooper]]s, an elite group of [[Color/Legends|black]]-[[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|armored]] stormtroopers empowered with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" /> In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]], which features Grath, to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].</ref> Grath and a number of other dark [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] and regular stormtroopers were dispatched on a [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (Operation Shadow Hand)|mission]] to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

Commanded by [[Zasm Katth]] and [[Baddon Fass]]—two of Palpatine's [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and members of the [[Dark Side Elite]]—the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces were assigned a set of missions to accomplish on the moon. Grath and the rest of the [[Troop/Legends|troops]] under the Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] command were to contact the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and recruit him on a search for the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|starship]] belonging to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] heroes [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Additional objectives included reporting on any potential sightings of the ''Millennium Falcon'' to the leader of the Dark Side Elite, [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], and eliminating the fugitive [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vima-Da-Boda]], who had taken shelter on Nar Shaddaa.<ref name="CSWE Katth">{{CSWECite|II|204|Katth, Zasm}}</ref>

===Massacre on Nar Shaddaa===
{{Quote|This is ''Imperial work''. I hope we're not too late to save Vima.|Leia Organa Solo, seeing the bodies of Grath's victims|<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />}}
After Katth and Fass failed to recruit [[Clan Fett|Fett]] to their cause, they received intelligence from [[darktrooper team two]], which had spotted the ''Millennium Falcon'' landing inside the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] of the local [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] [[Shug Ninx]] and had engaged the New Republic [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Grath then accompanied the two Dark Jedi and several other stormtroopers as they navigated through the streets of Nar Shaddaa to reinforce team two and to seize the ''Millennium Falcon''. However, as Katth and Fass were passing through one of the crowded streets, they both [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] the presence of Vima-Da-Boda nearby.<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

[[File:Elite3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Grath brings up the turbocannon.]]
Following their orders from Sedriss to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the elderly Jedi woman, Fass ordered Grath to arm his [[turbocannon]] and fire at the crowd. Grath followed the orders without question, unloading a barrage of fire at innocent bystanders. The indiscriminate attack killed a large number of people, yet it failed to harm Vima-Da-Boda, who escaped into the lower levels of Nar Shaddaa, where she was eventually found by the [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]].<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

Grath's superiors soon reached Ninx's hangar, where they found the ''Millennium Falcon'' abandoned and the entirety of the Imperial forces wiped out. Taking the bodies of their fallen [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], Fass and Katth returned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Imperial-class)|''Invincible'']] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the moon, leaving only a small detachment of stormtroopers to guard the ''Millennium Falcon''. However, that team was also killed by Solo and his allies when they returned to reclaim their ship.<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

==Personality and traits==
Grath followed the orders of his superiors, Fass and Katth, on Nar Shaddaa, massacring multiple unarmed civilians just to try and kill the elusive Jedi Vima-Da-Boda, although he failed to achieve that goal.<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

==Powers and abilities==
{{Quote|Those are darktroopers. The elite of the Imperial stormtroopers.|audio=ThoseAreDarkTroopers.flac|[[Kam Solusar]]|<ref name="Dark Empire II audio drama">[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
As a darktrooper, Grath's skills were augmented with the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]],<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" /> and he received limited Force training to become a more deadly combatant than his compatriots in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]].<ref name="Rebellion">The [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] states that all [[darktrooper]]s received limited [[The Force/Legends|Force]] training, making them [[Death/Legends|deadlier]] than regular [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Grath's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' establishes him as a member of the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]], while the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] depicts Grath as a dark [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]].</ref>

==Equipment==
Grath wore a set of black-colored stormtrooper armor on Nar Shaddaa. During the mission to the moon, he wielded a turbocannon, strapped over his shoulder.<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grath first appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]], written by [[Tom Veitch]] and illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]].<ref name="Duel on Nar Shaddaa" /> It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[January 24]], [[1995]].<ref name="Marvel DE 2">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54064/star_wars_dark_empire_ii_1994_2|text=Star Wars: Dark Empire II (1994) #2}}</ref>
